variants.label: Reckless Full scalar fallback
variants.note: v60 full-size NNUE scalar WASI/UCI fallback for browsers without WebAssembly SIMD.

variants.label: Reckless Full SIMD
variants.note: v60 full-size NNUE with integrated wasm simd128 backend; preferred default when supported.

variants.label: Reckless Full browser API experimental
variants.note: Full-size NNUE with direct WASM exports; bypasses WASI/UCI text for lower adapter overhead.

variants.label: Reckless Full browser API SIMD experimental
variants.note: Direct browser API artifact combined with the integrated wasm simd128 NNUE backend.
